description: Bridge methods for filesystem-native workspace management

methods.name: OpenWorkspace
methods.description: Initializes the workspace and starts the FS watcher.

methods.name: GetCollections
methods.description: Scans the workspace and returns the folder/file tree.

methods.name: ReadFile
methods.description: Reads the raw content of an .http file.

methods.name: SaveFile
methods.description: Writes raw content to an .http file.

methods.name: ParseContent
methods.description: Parses raw .http content and returns the AST (FileNode).
